scripts.dev: bun run dev:server & bun run dev:web
scripts.build:node: bun run build:node:linux && bun run build:node:mac && bun run build:node:windows
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @central/shared typecheck && bun run --filter @central/server typecheck && bun run --filter @central/web typecheck && bun run --filter @central/node typecheck
